title: pavetta longiflora var. javana
intro: Pavetta longiflora var. javana, also known as Java tea tree, is a plant species native to Indonesia that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pavetta longiflora var. javana include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves are typically used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
